items.title: Android 17 arrives on Pixel phones today
items.summary: Following its official debut last month, Google is now rolling out Android 17 to compatible Pixel phones, alongside additional exclusive features as part of the June Pixel Drop. Not every feature announced alongside the OS at the pre-I/O Android Show is available today, though. Android 17 itself is arriving on Pixel phones today, and Google […]

items.title: The Google / Xreal Aura XR glasses are now available to preorder
items.summary: The Project Aura glasses collaboration between Xreal and Google is now one step closer to being something you can buy. Reservations for the second Android XR device, now dubbed the Xreal Aura, are available for $99 starting today, with a full launch in the US, UK, Japan, Canada, and South Korea expected sometime this Fall. […]

items.title: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
items.summary: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.

items.title: Google launches Wear OS 7 with Live Updates and a battery life boost
items.summary: Google's Wear OS 7 update is starting to roll out today for the Pixel Watch 2, 3, and 4, adding a new Live Updates feature that tracks live events from your Android smartwatch. Live Updates will now sync with Wear OS devices, so updates like sports scores or an ongoing meal delivery will show up […]

items.title: All the latest news on Android 17, Wear OS 7, and Android XR
items.summary: Google’s Android 17 update includes highlights like new floating “Bubble” app windows for easier multitasking, a Screen Reaction recording mode, and a 50/50 split gaming mode for foldable phones. Meanwhile, Wear OS 7 brings Live Updates and better battery life for smart watches, and it prepares connections for new Android XR smart glasses that will […]

items.title: SpaceX to acquire the AI coding startup Cursor for $60 billion
items.summary: The deal will help to bolster the company's efforts to compete with rivals like Anthropic and OpenAI, which also offer popular coding tools.

items.title: Anthropic's Fable shutdown is a big moment for open-source AI
items.summary: Anthropic’s Fable shutdown could boost open-source AI, but many of the models gaining traction are Chinese.

items.title: Prediction market traders speculate Anthropic will restore access quickly to AI model after Trump admin directed it to limit reach
items.summary: Traders think it's more likely than not that access is restored by July 1.

items.title: DOJ assists Musk's xAI in NAACP air pollution suit, asks court to toss case
items.summary: The DOJ is asking a Mississippi federal court to dismiss a lawsuit filed by the NAACP against Elon Musk's xAI, now owned by SpaceX.

items.title: Jim Cramer says SpaceX investors aren't buying earnings — they're buying Elon Musk
items.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer said SpaceX investors are betting on Elon Musk's vision and track record, rather than the company's current earnings power.

items.title: Databricks sales growth tops 80%, but margin are shrinking from swarm of AI agents
items.summary: Databricks is seeing higher growth as AI agents assist with data analysis, but all that activity is significantly increasing costs.

items.title: SpaceX rises 4% to leapfrog Amazon in market cap, closes short of Microsoft
items.summary: CEO Elon Musk said Sunday that the company "might be able to reach approximately" $1 trillion revenue in 2030.

items.title: ‘We own our home outright’: I am 67 and earn $100,000. Do I take my $30,000-a-year Social Security now or wait?
items.summary: “We have combined savings of $950,000 in retirement plans, Roth IRAs and Treasuries.”
